description_long: This is a heavily weathered and modified van with a boxy, vintage body style, featuring a rusted and multicolored exterior. The van is loaded with various items on its roof, including barrels, crates, and metal containers, all secured with ropes and straps, giving it a rugged, post-apocalyptic appearance. The windows are mostly intact but appear dirty and aged, with some covered by protective grilles or panels. The front of the van has a reinforced grille and additional metalwork, while the rear is equipped with ladders and more storage, suggesting utility and preparedness for long journeys. The tires are worn, and the bodywork shows significant signs of use, dents, and patchwork repairs. The overall impression is of a survivalist or scavenger vehicle, likely used for transporting goods or people in challenging urban or wasteland environments.
description: A battered, vintage-style van with a rusted, multicolored exterior, loaded with barrels and crates on the roof, and reinforced with metalwork for rugged utility.
description_view_0: Side view showing the van's rusted panels, multiple windows, and a cluttered roof packed with barrels and crates.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the reinforced grille, headlamps, and the dense arrangement of items strapped to the roof.
description_view_2: Opposite side view similar to view 0, with visible patchwork repairs and more details of the roof cargo.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying ladders, rear doors, and additional containers on the roof, with visible wear and patching.
attribute_door_configuration: two front doors, one sliding side door, two rear doors
